code: import axios from'axios';const baseURL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||'http://localhost:3333/api';const useMockApi=process.env.REACT_APP_USE_MOCK_API!=='false';export const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL,timeout:8000});const delay=ms=>new Promise(resolve=>{setTimeout(resolve,ms);});const unwrap=raw=>{if(typeof raw==='object'&&raw!==null&&'data'in raw){return raw.data;}return raw;};export const getWithFallback=async function(path,mockFactory){let mockDelayMs=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:200;if(useMockApi){await delay(mockDelayMs);return mockFactory();}try{const response=await apiClient.get(path);return unwrap(response.data);}catch(error){await delay(mockDelayMs);return mockFactory();}};export const postWithFallback=async function(path,body,mockFactory){let mockDelayMs=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:200;if(useMockApi){await delay(mockDelayMs);return mockFactory();}try{const response=await apiClient.post(path,body);return unwrap(response.data);}catch(error){await delay(mockDelayMs);return mockFactory();}};export const patchWithFallback=async function(path,body,mockFactory){let mockDelayMs=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:160;if(useMockApi){await delay(mockDelayMs);return mockFactory();}try{const response=await apiClient.patch(path,body);return unwrap(response.data);}catch(error){await delay(mockDelayMs);return mockFactory();}};
